name: Anadarko Petroleum Corporation
description: Anadarko Petroleum Corporation was one of the world's largest independent oil and natural gas exploration and production companies. Headquartered in The Woodlands, Texas, the company engaged in the exploration, development, production, and marketing of oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids, with significant operations in the United States, deepwater Gulf of Mexico, and international locations including Mozambique, Algeria, and Ghana. In August 2019, Anadarko was acquired by Occidental Petroleum Corporation.
